source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for executor_test.go
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

Issue Number: close #28577 close #33425 close #33432

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - // TODO here: index join cause the data race of txn. | res.Sort().Check(testkit.Rows("test checksum_with_index 0 2 2", "test checksum_without_index 1 1 1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: - // TODO here: index join cause the data race of txn. | res.Sort().Check(testkit.Rows("test checksum_with_index 0 2 2", "test checksum_without_index 1 1 1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `executor_test.go` from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues by adopting modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: - // TODO here: index join cause the data race of txn. | res.Sort().Check(testkit.Rows("test checksum_with_index 0 2 2", "test checksum_without_index 1 1 1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
